We compare our system against existing frameworks for neural network intervention.

Table 1: Comparison of mechanistic interpretability frameworks.
| Framework | Supported models | Distributed | License |
|-----------|-----------------|-------------|---------|
| TransformerLens | GPT-2, Pythia | No | MIT |
| NNsight | Any HuggingFace | Yes (NDIF) | MIT |
| baukit | GPT-2, BERT | No | Apache |
| pyvene | Any HuggingFace | No | Apache |

Our framework extends the approach of NNsight with additional circuit analysis tools.
